item.summary: Presence of a Foreign Tablets: Complaint received, possible mix-up of Selexipag 1000 mcg tablet in a bottle of Lacosamide Tablets USP, 100mg. Product details: Lacosamide Tablets, USP, C V, 100mg, Rx only, 60-count bottle, By: Annora Pharma Pvt., Ltd, Sangareddy -502313, Telangana, India, Manufactured for: Camber Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Piscataway, NJ 08854, NDC 31722-813-60.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
